sample_operations.text: Is the site boundary clearly defined using physical or visual demarcation?
Are perimeter fencing elements present where boundary control is required?
Are perimeter gates or controlled openings present at designated access points?
Are vehicle access points identified and controlled at the site perimeter?
Are physical barriers present to restrict or channel vehicle movement at the perimeter?
Are clear zones maintained along the perimeter to support visibility and observation?
Is perimeter lighting present to support visibility during hours of darkness?
Is perimeter signage present to communicate access restrictions or site boundaries?
Are entry points secured using locking mechanisms appropriate to restrict unauthorized entry?
Are electronically controlled locking devices used at designated controlled doors?
Are access readers present at controlled entry points to support credentialed access?
Is electronic access control used to permit or deny entry at controlled doors or areas?
Are credentials issued to identify authorized personnel for access purposes?
Is there a defined process to identify and manage visitors prior to granting access beyond public areas?
Is door status monitored for designated controlled doors to detect forced entry or propped doors?
Is PIN or code-based entry used at any controlled entry points?
Is biometric-based entry used at any controlled entry points?
Are controlled vestibules or interlocks used at any primary entry points to manage entry flow?
Is there an intrusion alarm control unit or panel used to manage intrusion alarms for the site?
Are intrusion sensors used to detect unauthorized opening of designated doors or access points?
Are intrusion sensors used to detect motion within designated protected areas?
Are intrusion sensors used to detect forced entry through glass or glazing in designated areas?
Is intrusion detection used to monitor the perimeter or exterior boundary for unauthorized entry?
Are duress or panic activation devices available for personnel to request assistance in designated areas?
Are intrusion alarms monitored such that alarm events can be received and acted on when they occur?

all_operations.text: Is the site boundary clearly defined using physical or visual demarcation?
Are perimeter fencing elements present where boundary control is required?
Are perimeter gates or controlled openings present at designated access points?
Are vehicle access points identified and controlled at the site perimeter?
Are physical barriers present to restrict or channel vehicle movement at the perimeter?
Are clear zones maintained along the perimeter to support visibility and observation?
Is perimeter lighting present to support visibility during hours of darkness?
Is perimeter signage present to communicate access restrictions or site boundaries?
Are entry points secured using locking mechanisms appropriate to restrict unauthorized entry?
Are electronically controlled locking devices used at designated controlled doors?
Are access readers present at controlled entry points to support credentialed access?
Is electronic access control used to permit or deny entry at controlled doors or areas?
Are credentials issued to identify authorized personnel for access purposes?
Is there a defined process to identify and manage visitors prior to granting access beyond public areas?
Is door status monitored for designated controlled doors to detect forced entry or propped doors?
Is PIN or code-based entry used at any controlled entry points?
Is biometric-based entry used at any controlled entry points?
Are controlled vestibules or interlocks used at any primary entry points to manage entry flow?
Is there an intrusion alarm control unit or panel used to manage intrusion alarms for the site?
Are intrusion sensors used to detect unauthorized opening of designated doors or access points?
Are intrusion sensors used to detect motion within designated protected areas?
Are intrusion sensors used to detect forced entry through glass or glazing in designated areas?
Is intrusion detection used to monitor the perimeter or exterior boundary for unauthorized entry?
Are duress or panic activation devices available for personnel to request assistance in designated areas?
Are intrusion alarms monitored such that alarm events can be received and acted on when they occur?
Are cameras positioned to provide coverage of designated exterior and interior areas of concern?
Are exterior areas monitored by cameras where observation is needed?
Are interior areas monitored by cameras where observation is needed?
Is video recorded for designated cameras?
Is recorded video retained for a defined period of time?
Are camera feeds monitored in real time when operational monitoring is required?
Can recorded video be retrieved and reviewed when needed for incidents or investigations?
Does the video system continue to provide monitoring or recording if a single component fails?
Is automated video-based alerting used for any monitored areas?
Are access-restricted areas designated within the facility to protect sensitive operations or assets?
Are interior doors used to separate public, staff, and restricted areas where separation is required?
Are hard interior barriers present to delay or prevent unauthorized movement into designated restricted areas?
Are secure rooms used to protect designated critical assets, systems, or records?
Are designated storage locations used to secure sensitive items or controlled assets when not in use?
Is there a designated area intended to provide temporary protection for occupants during an emergency?
Is interior lighting present to support visibility and observation in key circulation areas?
Are structural features present to increase resistance to forced entry at designated areas of the facility?
Are exterior walls reinforced or constructed to resist unauthorized penetration where required?
Is impact-resistant glazing or equivalent protection present at designated exterior windows or openings?
Is window film or other glazing treatment used to reduce fragmentation or delay entry at designated locations?
Are ballistic-resistant features present to protect occupants or critical functions in designated areas?
Are design features present to reduce the effects of explosive forces on critical facility elements?
Is master key access controlled to limit who can unlock multiple areas of the facility?
Are restricted keys used for designated areas where key duplication or distribution must be controlled?
Are keys stored in a secured manner to prevent unauthorized access when not in use?
Is key issuance and return tracked to support accountability for designated keys?
Is rekeying performed when key control is compromised or when access should be removed?
Is there a capability to broadcast messages to occupants within the facility when needed?
Is there a capability to notify specific individuals or groups within the facility when needed?
Is there a two-way communication capability for security or operations personnel when needed?
Are communication procedures established for routine and emergency security communications?
Is there a backup communication capability available if primary communications are unavailable?
Is there a capability to communicate with external response partners when coordination is required?
Are evacuation procedures established to guide occupants during an emergency requiring relocation?
Are procedures established to secure areas during an emergency requiring restricted movement?
Are shelter-in-place procedures established for emergencies where occupants must remain inside?
Are designated muster points or rally areas identified for occupants following evacuation?
Are reunification procedures established to account for occupants following an emergency?
Are staff emergency roles defined to support execution of emergency actions?
Are emergency guides or quick-reference materials available to support emergency actions?
Are emergency drills conducted to familiarize occupants or staff with emergency actions?
Is there a defined crisis management capability to coordinate decision-making during major incidents?
Is there a capability to communicate emergency information to internal and external stakeholders during incidents?
Are critical systems supported by redundancy or backup capabilities to maintain operations during disruptions?
Is there a business continuity capability to sustain or restore essential functions following a disruption?
Is resilience planning conducted to address long-term recovery and adaptation following incidents?
Is there a capability to align incident management activities with external response frameworks when required?
Is there an established point of contact or liaison with local law enforcement for security coordination?
Is there a defined method to report security incidents or concerns to external authorities when required?
Is there a capability to receive and share relevant threat information with appropriate external partners?
Does the organization participate in any information-sharing networks relevant to its operations?
Is there a mechanism to receive information or notifications from a fusion center or similar entity?
Is there a capability to coordinate with joint task force or federal partners when appropriate?
Are security personnel assigned to fixed posts or locations where monitoring or access control is required?
Are security patrols conducted to monitor designated areas of the facility?
Do security personnel have a means to communicate with each other or a central point while on duty?
Are response procedures established to guide security personnel actions during incidents?
Is there a method for security personnel to document and report security incidents?
Are security personnel provided training relevant to their assigned duties?
Is responsibility for security oversight assigned within the organization?
Are security policies established to define expected security practices?
Are security procedures established to guide routine security activities?
Is security-related documentation maintained to support security operations and continuity?
Is a process in place to identify and manage security risks to the facility?
Are security training programs established for relevant personnel?
Are site features used to reinforce territorial control and distinguish public and private areas?
Is the site designed to support natural observation of key areas by occupants or staff?
Are sightlines maintained to reduce concealment and support visibility in key areas?
Is landscaping managed to support visibility and access control around the facility?
Are environmental features used to reinforce ownership and appropriate use of space?
Is wayfinding used to guide visitors and reduce unauthorized movement into restricted areas?
